title: More Sandstone
description: "More Sandstone" does exactly what it's supposed to. Previously, four sand became one sandstone, now four sand become four sandstones. Including red sand.
body:
# 📖 About

The data pack was developed for 1.21. Functionality for older versions cannot be guaranteed. Certain older versions can be updated on request. Please send inquiries via our Discord.

# 💡 Installation

To use the data pack, you just need to save it in the "datapacks" folder in your world save directory. It is activated using the command /datapack enable "NAME".

If you generate a new world, you can select and activate the data packs in advance without commands.

# 📁 Features
With this data pack you can effectively produce more sandstone. Four sand blocks now become four sandstone blocks.
